description: This project builds a vault where users deposit NFTs as collateral for borrowing stablecoins. Unlike standard NFT lending, the Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio is dynamic and adjusts based on the NFT's rarity traits and floor price, verified via ZK proofs to protect privacy. The system uses a modular ERC-721 wrapper that tracks metadata changes. Smart contracts handle liquidation thresholds that shift based on market volatility. The frontend connects to a public RPC (Cloudflare) and displays real-time
angle: Transforms static NFTs into dynamic, self-adjusting collateral where LTV updates in real-time based on ZK-verified floor price oracles without revealing private wallet data.
